body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-43001", "cvss": {"score": 7.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "An issue was discovered in OpenStack Keystone 13 through 29. POST /v3/credentials did not validate that the caller-supplied project_id for an EC2-type credential matched the project of the authenticating application credential. This allowed an attacker holding an unrestricted application credential for project A to create an EC2 credential targeting project B; a subsequent /v3/ec2tokens exchange would then issue a Keystone token scoped to project B while still carrying the original app_cred_id, enabling cross-project lateral movement within the credential owner's role footprint.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00456, "percentile": 0.36733}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hhq2-3832-xxcv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T02:39:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hhq2-3832-xxcv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hhq2-3832-xxcv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43001"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-01T09:16:17Z", "published_at": "2026-05-01T09:30:25Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43001", "https://bugs.launchpad.net/keystone/+bug/2149775", "https://review.opendev.org/c/openstack/keystone/+/985804", "https://security.openstack.org/ossa/OSSA-2026-015.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hhq2-3832-xxcv"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://review.opendev.org/c/openstack/keystone", "summary": "OpenStack Keystone has an Incorrect Authorization Issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:22:13Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hhq2-3832-xxcv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "keystone"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 13.0.0, <= 29.0.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenStack Keystone has an Incorrect Authorization Issue
